name: Best Zucchini Bars
recipeInstructions:
FROSTING:
1/2 cup softened butter
1/4 teaspoon almond extract
2 teaspoons vanilla
2 1/2 cups confectioners' sugar
1 package (3 oz.) creamed cheese -- softened
Beat together sugar, oil and eggs in a large bowl or food processor. Beat in flour, cinnamon, salt, baking soda, and vanilla until well mixed. Fold in zucchini, carrot, oats, and nuts; mix well. Pour into a 15x10x1 inch pan (jelly roll pan or cookie sheet with sides). Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes. Make frosting by beating all ingredients together until smooth. Set aside to cool. Frost the bars and cut into bars. Yield: 3 dozen.
